coverage_note: Total Australian coal production: 467,739 kt (Geoscience Australia 2023-24). Includes export coal (~370,000 kt, 79%) and domestic coal (~98,700 kt, 21%). Per-kt energy and emissions coefficients calibrated from AES 2025 and NGGI 2025 and therefore apply directly to the total production basis.
notes: Calibrated to AES 2025 Table F and NGGI 2025. Energy at anchor: 467,739 kt × 372 GJ/kt = 174.0 PJ (AES 2025 reference: 174.0 PJ, coverage = 100.0%). Total scope 1 at anchor: 467,739 kt × 77.0 tCO2e/kt = 36.0 MtCO2e (NGGI 2025 reference: 36.0 MtCO2e). Demand trajectory: declining__coal_mining_total (−1.1%/yr compound, weighted average of export −0.75%/yr and domestic −2.5%/yr).
